zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon於1374年出生在愛爾蘭迪 本 米亞斯時，他的父親Sir James Fitzgerald Dillon32歲，母親Honora D'Arcy29歲。他於1399年與Anne Birmingham在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1430年在他的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon于1374年出生在爱尔兰迪 本 米亞斯时，他的父亲Sir James Fitzgerald Dillon32岁，母亲Honora D'Arcy29岁。他于1399年与Anne Birmingham在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1430年在他的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dillon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Irish, and French: from the Norman French personal name Dillon, arising from the ancient Germanic Dillo (of uncertain origin, perhaps a byname from the root dil- ‘destroy’).
English: habitational name from Dilwyn in Herefordshire, recorded in 1138 as Dilun, probably from Old English dīglum, dative plural of dīgle ‘settlement at the shady or secret places’.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duilleáin ‘descendant of Duilleán’, a personal name, a variant of Dallán meaning ‘little blind one’.

variants.name: Delon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Michel.
French: from a short form of the personal name Adelon, from ancient Germanic Adelo, a pet form of compound names formed with the element adel ‘noble’.

variants.name: Dillion
meanings: Irish and English: possibly a variant of   Dillon  .

variants.name: Dillow
meanings: English: habitational name from Dilwyn in Herefordshire, recorded as Delewe in 1295 and Dylewe in 1334. Compare Dillon 2.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: D'Arcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the English and Irish surname, originally a Norman baronial name (d'Arcy) borne by a family who came from Arcy in northern France. The surname was well established in north central England from the Middle Ages onwards, and various gentry families used it as a male given name from the late 1500s. It has always had a somewhat aristocratic flavour, which has added to its popularity as a first name. It is the surname of the hero of Jane Austen's novel Pride and Prejudice ( 1813 ). Its use as a girl's name, often spelled Darcey —as in the case of the British ballerina Darcey Bussell ( b. 1969 )—is more recent and is now predominant.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon was born in 1374, in Diocese of Meath, Ireland, his father, Sir James Fitzgerald Dillon, was 32 and his mother, Honora D'Arcy, was 29. He married Anne Birmingham in 1399, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1430, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon est né en 1374, à Diocese of Meath, Irlande, son père, Sir James Fitzgerald Dillon, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Honora D'Arcy, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Anne Birmingham en 1399, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1430, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon 1374 in Diocese of Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir James Fitzgerald Dillon 32 und seine Mutter Honora D'Arcy 29. Er hat 1399 in Irland Anne Birmingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1430 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon è nato il nel 1374 nel Diocese of Meath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Sir James Fitzgerald Dillon, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Honora D'Arcy, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Anne Birmingham nel 1399, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1430, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillonが1374年にアイルランドディオセゼ オフ メアスで生まれた時，父Sir James Fitzgerald Dillonは32歳，母Honora D'Arcyは29歳であった。1399年にアイルランドでAnne Birminghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1430年に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon(이)가 1374년 아일랜드 디오스스 프 미스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James Fitzgerald Dillon(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Honora D'Arcy(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1399년 아일랜드에서 Anne Birmingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1430년 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon nasceu em 1374, em Diocese of Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir James Fitzgerald Dillon, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Honora D'Arcy, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Birmingham em 1399, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1430, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon родился в 1374 г. в местности диосес оф мит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Sir James Fitzgerald Dillon было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Honora D'Arcy, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Birmingham в 1399 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1430 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon nació en 1374, en Diocese of Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Sir James Fitzgerald Dillon, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Honora D'Arcy, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Anne Birmingham en 1399, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1430, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
